testcase.name: contextLoads

14:52:13.865 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.ProyectoAula.Backend.BackendApplicationTests]: BackendApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:52:13.990 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.ProyectoAula.Backend.BackendApplication for test class com.ProyectoAula.Backend.BackendApplicationTests

level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-03-12T14:52:18.591-05:00 INFO 31040 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table citas ( id_cita bigint generated by default as identity, confirmado boolean, direccion varchar(255), estado varchar(255), fecha date not null, hora time(6) not null, id_medico bigint, id_p bigint not null, id_servicio bigint not null, primary key (id_cita) ) Hibernate: create table confirmation_token ( id bigint generated by default as identity, expires_at timestamp(6), token varchar(255) not null, used boolean not null, id_cita bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table consultas_ia ( id_consulta bigint generated by default as identity, agente varchar(255), cliente_username varchar(255), estado varchar(255), fecha_hora timestamp(6), pregunta varchar(4000), respuesta varchar(4000), tokens_aproximados integer, primary key (id_consulta) ) Hibernate: create table contacto ( id_contacto bigint generated by default as identity, asunto varchar(255) not null, email varchar(255) not null, fecha_envio timestamp(6), mensaje TEXT not null, nombre varchar(255) not null, primary key (id_contacto) ) Hibernate: create table detalle_odontograma ( id_detalle bigint generated by default as identity, estado varchar(255) not null, observacion TEXT, id_diente bigint not null, id_odontograma bigint not null, primary key (id_detalle) ) Hibernate: create table dientes ( id_diente bigint generated by default as identity, codigofdi varchar(255) not null, nombre varchar(255) not null, primary key (id_diente) ) Hibernate: create table evaluacion_psicologica ( id_evaluacion bigint generated by default as identity, fecha date, notas varchar(1000), puntaje integer, respuestas_json varchar(4000), tipo varchar(255), id_paciente bigint not null, primary key (id_evaluacion) ) Hibernate: create table medico_servicio ( id_persona bigint not null, id_servicio bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table odontogramas ( id_odontograma bigint generated by default as identity, fecha_registro date not null, observaciones_generales TEXT, id_p bigint not null, primary key (id_odontograma) ) Hibernate: create table personas ( id_p bigint generated by default as identity, certificado varchar(255), dias_disponibles varchar(255), direccion varchar(255), doc_iden varchar(255), email varchar(255), hora_fin_disponibilidad time(6), hora_inicio_disponibilidad time(6), nombre_completo varchar(255), password_hash varchar(255), rol enum ('CLIENTE','MEDICO','PACIENTE'), telefono varchar(255), username varchar(255), primary key (id_p) ) Hibernate: create table registros_cobro ( id_registro bigint generated by default as identity, cliente_username varchar(255), estado_pago varchar(255), fecha_hora timestamp(6), monto numeric(38,2), tipo_servicio varchar(255), primary key (id_registro) ) Hibernate: create table servicios ( id_servicio bigint generated by default as identity, tipo_servicio varchar(255), id_tipo_servicio bigint not null, primary key (id_servicio) ) Hibernate: create table testimonios ( id bigint generated by default as identity, calificacion integer not null, comentario varchar(1000) not null, fecha_creacion timestamp(6) not null, nombre varchar(255) not null, id_servicio bigint, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table tipo_servicio ( id_tipo_servicio bigint generated by default as identity, nombre varchar(255), primary key (id_tipo_servicio) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists confirmation_token drop constraint if exists UK54wolcn5ryqshiq8gq0epvr3v Hibernate: alter table if exists confirmation_token add constraint UK54wolcn5ryqshiq8gq0epvr3v unique (token) Hibernate: alter table if exists dientes drop constraint if exists UKnnf7d6dtc1a3h5298oaajsrnc Hibernate: alter table if exists dientes add constraint UKnnf7d6dtc1a3h5298oaajsrnc unique (codigofdi) Hibernate: alter table if exists personas drop constraint if exists UKft559modqtty7vhfmwhdyah4j Hibernate: alter table if exists personas add constraint UKft559modqtty7vhfmwhdyah4j unique (doc_iden) Hibernate: alter table if exists citas add constraint FKqmo85a59ii6vxb4itn9g1thhk foreign key (id_medico) references personas Hibernate: alter table if exists citas add constraint FK2dcvvpssopc19gixb62o9hyk8 foreign key (id_p) references personas FKp49so64sh77vmtjo4ecmaqks5 foreign key (id_servicio) references servicios Hibernate: alter table if exists medico_servicio add constraint FKo7tgvw99mpitx39pxcfkij3w2 foreign key (id_persona) references personas Hibernate: alter table if exists odontogramas add constraint FKkxn9qriliy4qqfpgg5fo8lqor foreign key (id_p) references personas Hibernate: alter table if exists servicios add
